source.name: Finnish Immigration Service (Migri) — Income requirement for students

extraSources.name: Study in Finland — Student residence permit

requirements.label: Admission to a Finnish institution
requirements.detail: Acceptance to a degree programme at a Finnish higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Income requirement
requirements.detail: Show at least €800 per month (€9,600 for a year-long study period) available in your account when you apply.

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Insurance valid in Finland; the required coverage level depends on your study length.

requirements.label: English language proof
requirements.detail: IELTS/TOEFL as your programme requires for English-taught study.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the residence-permit period.

requirements.label: Tuition fees (non-EU/EEA)
requirements.detail: Non-EU/EEA students usually pay tuition; many also receive a scholarship that offsets it.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Finnish number and data on landing.
